title: Name Tweaks
description: Tweaks certain block or item names to avoid confusion, or just to make the game look better
body:
Name Tweaks is a simple resource pack that changes the name of some items to avoid confusion, or just to make it look better.

List of tweaked items:\
Spyglass is now called Telescope\
Warped and Crimson Stem is now called Warped and Crimson Log (Including stripped variants)\
Warped and Crimson Nylium is now called Warped and Crimson Netherrack\
Warped and Crimson Hyphae is now called Warped and Crimson Wood\
Mutton and Cooked Mutton is now called Lamb and Cooked Lamb\
Steak is now called Cooked Beef\
Roast Chicken is now called Cooked Chicken\
Bottle O' Enchanting is now called Experience Bottle\
Bread is now called Loaf of Bread\
Enchanted Golden Apple is now called Enchanted Apple

I hope you enjoy!
